mapper.select:
select u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.id_number, u.phone, fi.id as flight_id, fi.flight_number, fi.departure, fi.destination, o.id as order_id, o.number as order_number, o.status as order_status, o.order_time, od.dish_id, od.name as dish_name, od.dish_flavor, od.number as dish_count from orders o inner join order_detail od on od.order_id = o.id inner join user u on u.id = o.user_id left join flight_info fi on fi.id = u.current_flight_id
and fi.flight_number like concat('%', #{flightNumber}, '%')
and u.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and u.id_number like concat('%', #{idNumber}, '%')
order by o.order_time desc, o.id desc, od.id asc

select u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.id_number, u.phone, fi.id as flight_id, fi.flight_number, fi.departure, fi.destination, ms.id as order_id, ms.number as order_number, case when ms.status = 5 then 5 when ms.status = 3 then 3 when ms.status = 1 and mlog.recommended_dishes is not null then 3 else ms.status end as order_status, ms.create_time as order_time, null as dish_id, case when mlog.recommended_dishes is not null then ifnull(( select group_concat(d.name order by find_in_set(cast(d.id as char), replace(replace(replace(replace(mlog.recommended_dishes, ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), '"', '')) separator '、') from dish d where find_in_set(cast(d.id as char), replace(replace(replace(replace(mlog.recommended_dishes, ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), '"', '')) > 0 ), replace(replace(replace(replace(mlog.recommended_dishes, ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), '"', '')) when alog.recommended_dishes is not null then replace(replace(replace(replace(alog.recommended_dishes, ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), '"', '') else '未记录具体餐食' end as dish_name, '-' as dish_flavor, case when mlog.recommended_dishes is not null then 1 + length(replace(replace(replace(replace(mlog.recommended_dishes, ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), '"', '')) - length(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(mlog.recommended_dishes, ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), '"', ''), ',', '')) when alog.recommended_dishes is not null then 1 + length(replace(replace(replace(replace(alog.recommended_dishes, ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), '"', '')) - length(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(alog.recommended_dishes, ' ', ''), '[', ''), ']', ''), '"', ''), ',', '')) else 0 end as dish_count from meal_selection ms inner join user u on u.id = ms.user_id left join flight_info fi on fi.id = ms.flight_id left join ( select rl.user_id, rl.flight_id, rl.recommended_dishes from recommendation_log rl inner join ( select user_id, flight_id, max(id) as latest_id from recommendation_log where user_feedback like 'MANUAL_SELECTED%' and recommended_dishes is not null and nullif(replace(trim(recommended_dishes), ' ', ''), '[]') is not null group by user_id, flight_id ) latest_manual on latest_manual.latest_id = rl.id ) mlog on mlog.user_id = ms.user_id and mlog.flight_id = ms.flight_id left join ( select rl.user_id, rl.flight_id, rl.recommended_dishes from recommendation_log rl inner join ( select user_id, flight_id, max(id) as latest_id from recommendation_log where user_feedback = 'AUTO_SELECTED_OVERDUE' and recommended_dishes is not null and nullif(replace(trim(recommended_dishes), ' ', ''), '[]') is not null group by user_id, flight_id ) latest_auto on latest_auto.latest_id = rl.id ) alog on alog.user_id = ms.user_id and alog.flight_id = ms.flight_id
and fi.flight_number like concat('%', #{flightNumber}, '%')
and u.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and u.id_number like concat('%', #{idNumber}, '%')
order by ms.create_time desc, ms.id desc
